song.title: Dark Room Desire
song.keywords: dark room, anonymous sex, desire, The Unseen Chorus
song.description: Full lyrics to 'Dark Room Desire' from The Unseen Chorus (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia (Agust Smari Bjarkarson).

og.title: Dark Room Desire Lyrics - The Unseen Chorus Musical
og.description: Full lyrics to 'Dark Room Desire' from The Unseen Chorus (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia (Agust Smari Bjarkarson).

twitter.title: Dark Room Desire Lyrics - The Unseen Chorus Musical
twitter.description: Full lyrics to 'Dark Room Desire' from The Unseen Chorus (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia. Dark room encounters.

essay: Dark Room Desire dramatizes anonymous sex as both escape and escalation. The track exposes how secrecy can feel like control while quietly deepening emotional fragmentation.
song.lyricsHtml:
Guess what
I'm wired I'm heading to the sauna tonight
It's heat and hunger served on a platter tonight

You can smell the fever rising what a delight
Bodies pressing closer I don't care tonight
Hands that claw mouths that bite
I'm the king of the dark it feels so right

No names no faces only desire
Every touch pulls me higher and higher
No names no faces bodies on fire
I burn I burn in dark room desire
Only desire only desire

Sweat on my skin fever in my chest
Strangers circling closer I give them the rest
Shadows crawl deeper my body's not my own
In the dark I vanish I'm overthrown

Harder faster
Don't stop
Use me
I can't get enough

No names no faces tearing me down
Every stranger's touch spins me around
No names no faces hunger's alive
I burn I break in dark room desire
Only desire only desire

Hands on my throat voices in my head
Another pulls me under I lose the thread
Heat on my tongue I'm slipping control
I don't care who just fill the hole

More more more
Take it take it
Faster deeper
Don't stop don't stop
Moans and gasps collide
No love no self just hide

No names no faces I'm pushed to the floor
I beg for it harder I'm begging for more
No names no faces nothing to save
I break I fall in the hole I crave
Hole I crave hole I crave

I don't know who I am anymore
